title: palicourea leiantha
intro: Palicourea leiantha, also known as the "Guinea tree" or "Dwarf Palicourea", is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Palicourea leiantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
